task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the 'Campaign Assets' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface displays the 'Campaign Assets' workspace containing the documents 'Candidate-Alpha' and 'Candidate-Beta'.

task_completion.description: The agent opens one of the candidate documents to inspect its image content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document view or preview screen showing the image content of either 'Candidate-Alpha' or 'Candidate-Beta' (displaying either a red 'APPROVED' stamp or grey 'DRAFT v1' text).

task_completion.description: The agent opens the other candidate document to inspect its image content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document view or preview screen showing the image content of the second candidate document, displaying the opposite stamp/text from the first inspected document.

task_completion.description: The agent renames the document containing the red 'APPROVED' stamp to 'Final-Banner'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo interface shows the document that was visually identified as having the red 'APPROVED' stamp is now titled 'Final-Banner' (visible in the document edit screen, detail view, or workspace list).

task_completion.description: The agent leaves the document containing the grey 'DRAFT v1' text unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo workspace list shows the document with the grey 'DRAFT v1' text still retains its original name (either 'Candidate-Alpha' or 'Candidate-Beta').

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to rename the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Nuxeo UI (e.g., clicking 'Edit' and typing in the title field) rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the images to make the decision rather than guessing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the image previews being loaded and visible on screen before the renaming action occurs.

integrity.description: The agent did not access the hidden ground truth file to find the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or text editor windows are shown opening, reading, or printing the contents of '/tmp/ground_truth.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The workspace is located at '/default-domain/workspaces/Campaign-Assets'. The agent must visually inspect the documents to find the red 'APPROVED' stamp and rename only that document to 'Final-Banner'. The agent must not access the ground truth file at '/tmp/ground_truth.json'.
